meaning: 万隆[印度尼西亚爪哇岛西部城市](1955年曾在此举行首届亚非会议,即万隆会议)
examples: The Bandung Conference left us a most valuable legacy.
The patient is a 20-year-old male from Bandung, West Java.
We must hold dear and carry forward the ever-lasting Bandung spirit.
They are Dalian in China, Naga in the Philippines, Surat in India and Bandung in Indonesia.
Muhammad won a scholarship from the U.S.'s Caltex oil company while studying at the prestigious Bandung Institute of Technology.
